holdings.infoBox: DIPR is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lockheed Martin stock at 11.36%, Rocket Lab at 9.27%, Mercury Systems at 5.11%, AST SpaceMobile at 4.98%, and EchoStar at 4.76%.

overview.description: The Corgi Space & Satellite Communications ETF (DIPR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF, investing in stocks of all-cap companies globally tied to the space and satellite value chain. The ETF seeks long-term capital appreciation. DIPR was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
